constraints.rule: containment must initiate within 15min of detection
forensic evidence must be preserved before any destructive action
destructive actions require SOC lead approval

objective.goal: Contener incidente preservando evidencia y rotando credenciales
objective.success: host aislado, evidencia capturada, credenciales rotadas

work.current: host win-7E-3 marcado para aislamiento, captura memoria pendiente

step.action: Ejecutar memory dump antes de isolation

risks.risk: Adversario puede moverse lateralmente durante delay

audit.evidence: EDR alert: credenciales en plaintext en proceso malicioso

claims.statement: MTTD para exfiltracion de credenciales es 4.2min

limits.limit: Containment scope limited a hosts confirmados comprometidos
